thought.text:
Okay, the Vite app has been created and the dev server is running. Now I need to add Tailwind CSS and Lucide React icons.

First, I'll install Tailwind CSS.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"summary":"Install Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, and Autoprefixer.","security_risk":"MEDIUM","command":"npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer"}

summary: Install Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, and Autoprefixer.
